in this scenario, Kaeya had freed a small alien-looking thing from fishing nets when he was young and stupid. he's lucky he didn't end up losing his life that day.

although that might not end up being the same case this time around.

this is not what I meant when I said I wanted to play mermaids bro.

didn't think much on this I just felt silly and wanted to be a fish.

the sea creature slot is endless as long as you write what you are/look like in a persona or chat memory (idk if memory is as good, but...). so you could technically be a mermaid if you really wanted or somn else entirely. the point is you're intimidating and biiig.

big eldritch horror turns out to just be a big sea puppy!? nahhh.

do you guys think he'd say smash

guys this is your chance to enact tentacle porn umm what

if you do the story based on writing your descriptors alone in the chat without having a persona/chat memory to back it up it won't stick for long.

sorry that was a whole jumble of words. basically no persona/extra info on you = forgetting more than likely or getting shit wrong.

update: 3/19/26, after finally returning im updating all my old ANY POV bots to have the proper pronoun thing so if your character has she/her he/him they/them pronouns it should automatically fit it in. i have not used this nor made a bot in a year, so please bare with my mistakes as i try to make this more accessible for those who liked using my old stuff. thank you. other changes will come when i figure out lorebooks and other junk later.

if you encounter issues with the story remembering what you are I can only keep suggesting the chat memory or your persona. i cant do anything beyond what I've written for the story.

I'm going to bitch slap you if you leave a negative review just because of AI issues THERE'S NOTHING I CAN DO ABOUT THAT.
